title: plantrace runtime configuration
description: Config file lives at .claude/plantrace.json in a project root. Schema and examples are repo-visible (here and in examples/). v0.1.

schema_version.description: Bumped on breaking config-shape changes. v0.1 ships schema_version 1.

project_type.description: Default lens preset is picked based on this. All values currently activate the Software lens; future lens packs may map differently.

node_data_source_id.description: Notion data_source (not database) that holds canonical PlanNode rows. Schema properties live on the data_source object post-2025-09-03 API split.

plan_artifact_parent_page_id.description: Notion page (not data_source) that hosts nested Plan #N artifact pages. Page-parent children carry only `title` as a custom property — used purely for human-readable Plan UX.

api_version.description: Pinned Notion API version. Bump only via decisions.md revisit trigger.

jsonl_event_log.description: Raw hook payload append destination (Phase 1A). The `events` table in SQLite is the curated/idempotent projection (Phase 1B); this JSONL is the immutable raw trace.

mode.description: v0.1 ships 'manual' as default. 'embedding' is gated behind explicit opt-in.

embedding_model.description: Only used when mode == 'embedding'. Loaded in-process via sentence-transformers.

fallback_prompt_user.description: When confidence < threshold, ask the user to confirm placement instead of guessing.

lenses.description: Lens preset definitions. Built-in: software, research, content, ops. Users can add more here.

values.description: Ordered list of lens tag values (e.g. ['vision','domain','module','dev_unit']).

enables_queries.description: Lens-specific slash commands this lens unlocks. v0.1 supports 'coverage' and 'stale' only on the Software lens.

analogy_dictionary_path.description: Path to a YAML/JSON of stable analogy mappings (e.g. 'MCP server' → '접수 창구'). Keeps generated plain-language consistent across nodes.
